def test_script_execution():
        """Priority 1: Run the script and verify output."""
        env = os.environ.copy()
        if "PREMBLY_APP_ID" not in env:
            env["PREMBLY_APP_ID"] = "dummy_app_id"
        if "PREMBLY_API_KEY" not in env:
            env["PREMBLY_API_KEY"] = "dummy_api_key"
